message.content:
@startuml
participant Agent as Agent
participant VirtualCoffeeMachine as VirtualCoffeeMachine
participant TestThing as TestThing

participant "strict" as strict1
participant "par" as par1
participant "par" as par2

participant "strict" as strict2
participant "par" as par3
participant "par" as par4

Agent ->> VirtualCoffeeMachine : top:wait()

strict1 --> par1
par1 --> VirtualCoffeeMachine : subscribeEvent: "maintenance"
VirtualCoffeeMachine --> par1 : confirmation
par1 --> VirtualCoffeeMachine : data-pushed
par1 --> VirtualCoffeeMachine : writeProperty: "string"

VirtualCoffeeMachine --> par2 : wait 500ms

strict2 --> par3
par3 --> VirtualCoffeeMachine : readProperty: "state"
VirtualCoffeeMachine --> par3 : response
par3 --> VirtualCoffeeMachine : writeProperty: "string"

Agent --> VirtualCoffeeMachine : exit

@enduml
